rounds.prompt: How many times longer is a great white shark than a surfboard?
rounds.fact: A surfboard is ~2 m; a great white shark averages ~5.5 m. They are roughly the same length — surfers take note.

rounds.prompt: How many times taller is the Statue of Liberty than a double-decker bus?
rounds.fact: A London double-decker is ~4.4 m tall. The Statue of Liberty stands 93 m to the torch — 21× taller.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a grand piano than a newborn baby?
rounds.fact: A newborn averages ~3 kg; a concert grand piano weighs ~480 kg — about 160× heavier.

rounds.prompt: How many times farther is the Sun than the Moon from Earth?
rounds.fact: The Moon is ~384,400 km away; the Sun is ~150 million km — about 390× further. Yet they look the same size in the sky.

rounds.prompt: How many times wider is the Milky Way than our Solar System?
rounds.fact: Our solar system spans ~0.002 light-years (to Oort Cloud); the Milky Way is ~100,000 light-years — about 50 million× wider by strict boundary, ~1,750× by heliosphere.
